title: ICAR-IISWC Young Professional-I Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
organization: ICAR-Indian Institute of Soil & Water Conservation (ICAR-IISWC)
short_info: ICAR-Indian Institute of Soil & Water Conservation (ICAR-IISWC) Young Professional-I (YP-I) Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of ICAR-IISWC. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the ICAR-IISWC Young Professional-I (YP-I) Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 50 years. No relaxation to any category.

qualification.education_qualification: B.Sc. Agriculture, B.Sc. or B.Sc.(Hons) Biotechnology, B.Sc. Microbiology, B.Sc. Environmental Science
qualification.details: YP-1: B.Sc. Agriculture / B.Sc. or B.Sc.(Hons) Biotechnology / Microbiology / Environmental Science. Desirable: Experience of working in lab, Solution/media preparation, autoclaving, wastewater collection and analysis, practical knowledge and skills to grow microalgae, Computer proficiency (MS Word, Excel, and PowerPoint etc.)

salary_details.details: Rs. 30,000/- Consolidated / No HRA Per Month

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for ICAR-IISWC YP-1 recruitment?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Young Professional-I (YP-1) post at ICAR-IISWC is scheduled for 23 June 2026. Candidates should ensure they reach the venue on time.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the YP-1 post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a B.Sc. Agriculture, B.Sc. or B.Sc.(Hons) Biotechnology, B.Sc. Microbiology, or B.Sc. Environmental Science degree to be eligible for the YP-1 position.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Young Professional-I post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Young Professional-I post is 50 years. There is no age relaxation provided for any category.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the YP-1 position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Young Professional-I post will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 30,000 per month, with no House Rent Allowance (HRA).

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Young Professional-I post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Young Professional-I (YP-1) post at ICAR-Indian Institute of Soil & Water Conservation.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for the ICAR-IISWC YP-1 recruitment?
faq.answer: There is no application fee required for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the YP-1 recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Young Professional-I post will involve a Walk-in Interview followed by Document Verification.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the walk-in interview venue?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at ICAR-Indian Institute of Soil & Water Conservation, Kota, Rajasthan, 324002.

faq.question: Q9. What documents should candidates bring for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must bring all original documents, self-attested photocopies of these documents, and recent passport-size photographs.

faq.question: Q10. Is this a permanent government job?
faq.answer: No, the Young Professional-I (YP-1) position is a contractual role. The job type is contractual.
